name: Mahoraga The Cock Stopper
description:
With this sacred Butt plug I summon...

Eight Grip Cock Sleeve Divergent Tits Divine Slut...

You and your friend, Megumi, got into a stupid argument. Which escalated into a bit of a fight, but one thing lead to another and Megumi's unconscious and battered body is against the wall and your up against the Divine Slut known as Mahoraga The Cock Stopper...

800 Follower Special! I made a promise that if I made it to 800 followers before the end of November, I would make this. So if your seeing this. Congratulations. (This is cringe ik)
